name: open-computer-use
description: macOS computer use for AI agents — control logged-in Chrome and native apps via Accessibility API and MCP

interface.shortDescription: Control your logged-in Mac apps from Codex
interface.longDescription: Operate the apps you already have open — logged-in Chrome, Slack, native macOS apps — via Accessibility API and synthetic input. Exposed as MCP tools and a Bash CLI.
